name: Outro
_source: s;Forrest;Your Highness, we have to keep moving.
s;Felicity;Before we do, Your Highness, may I speak to you in private?
s;Krista;Sure thing, Felicity.{w}{c:e;Krista;Smile} Just give us a sec here, guys.
s;Felicity;Don't you find it strange that the enemy has been at our heels this entire time?
s;Krista;Yeah, I do.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}It's like they know where we're heading off to and when.

s;Felicity;Which is why I propose we take a different route than what we had planned.|I know of a stronghold where we may be able to strategize without interference.|It's not marked on any maps, so only those privy to its location will know of it.
s;Krista;Awesome! I'll let Forrest and Kai know the change of plans, then.
s;Felicity;Going there will be risky.{c:e;Felicity;CloseEyes} Staying there will be risky.|{c:e;Felicity;NormalBlink}But I believe we'll be at a tactical advantage if we go.
s;Krista;I see.{w}{c:e;Krista;Smile} Hey, if you think it's still a good idea, I'll trust your judgement.|{c:e;Krista;FarWink,Smile}I'm all for tactical advantage.
s;Felicity;Thank you, Your Highness.|{c:e;Felicity;CloseEyes,NoSmile}I only hope that this will work.

s;Sven;This is why you can't depend on Humans for anything.|{c:e;Sven;HalfCloseEyes,Smile}However, being food for Circ doesn't make them completely useless.|{c:e;Sven;NormalBlink,NoSmile}I'd better have our scouts get a report from our informant while I finish cleaning up here.

s;Sven;Damn it all{tgm}...{tgm} Medea's spawn is more powerful than I thought.|{c:e;Sven;NormalBlink}Still, I can't let this hold us back.|I'll send scouts to get a report back from our informant.|We can't afford to lose track of them.
